'''Stinna Draesinge Sha''' was a programmer and teacher at the [[Magrody Institute of Programmable Intelligence/Legends|Magrody Institute of Programmable Intelligence]], and a brilliant [[Artificial intelligence/Legends|AI]] programming theoretician.

==Biography==
Sha was taught by [[Professor/Legends|Professor]] [[Nasdra Magrody]] himself and she in turn instructed future [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], [[Cray Mingla]]. Sha studied [[Ssi-ruu]]vi [[Droid/Legends|droid]] starfighters and the [[entechment]] process, trying to discover how the [[Alien/Legends|aliens]] were able to capture a person's life energy.

After retiring, Sha was [[Assassin/Legends|assassinated]] in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], apparently by [[Phlygas Grynne]], just before [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] and [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] went to [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]] to attend a [[Herd Meet/Legends|Herd Meet]].
